name: sqlterminal-win32
description: Native Win32 port of SQLTerminal (SQLite/PostgreSQL query terminal).
$note: Declared for P4+ (PostgreSQL via libpq) and P5 (JSON persistence). P0/P1 build with no vcpkg deps. SQLite is vendored as third_party/sqlite/sqlite3.c rather than a vcpkg port. To enable: set a builtin-baseline (vcpkg x-update-baseline) and configure with the vcpkg CMake toolchain file.
